tasks.subject: Task 1: Fix the 180° feed-steering clock flip
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A feed aimed at clock angle φ is physically displaced at φ+180° so the beam lands at φ; add regression tests that fail against current code.

**Files:** Modify antenna-model/src/model/coordinates.rs (to_feed_displacement, from_feed_position, 3 tests), direct_path.rs:308 test, ray_trace.rs:379 test; Create antenna-model/tests/beam_steering_direction.rs.

**Verify:** cargo test -p antenna-model

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/coordinates.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/direct_path.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/ray_trace.rs", "antenna-model/tests/beam_steering_direction.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model", "acceptanceCriteria": ["gain at requested steering side exceeds opposite side by >30 dB (az=0 and az=90 cases)", "round-trip test passes unmodified", "cargo test -p antenna-model green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Apply beam deviation factor to steering displacement
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Scale steering displacement by 1/BDF (Lo 1960, K=0.36) so the PO beam peak lands at the requested angle.

**Files:** coordinates.rs (_with_bdf variants), coordinates_3d.rs (beam_deviation_factor, diameter param on compute_feed_position_from_pointing), mod.rs export, evaluator.rs:141, h3_link_budget.rs:87, evaluator test ~992, tests/beam_steering_direction.rs.

**Verify:** cargo test -p antenna-model

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/coordinates.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/coordinates_3d.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/mod.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/h3_link_budget.rs", "antenna-model/tests/beam_steering_direction.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model", "acceptanceCriteria": ["beam_deviation_factor(0.5) in [0.86,0.88] and (10.0) > 0.99", "2 deg steer peaks within 0.15 deg of 2.0 deg on 10m/5m dish", "both service callers pass diameter"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Remove near-boresight direct-path interference mode
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete the physically unsound direct-path model; near-boresight offset-feed queries fall through to standard PO.

**Files:** Delete direct_path.rs; Modify pattern.rs (imports, dispatch arm 259-261, compute_gain_direct_path 402-445), edge_cases.rs (variant, fields, select_computation_mode, 2 tests), mod.rs:16,22,97.

**Verify:** cargo test --all + empty grep for direct_path/NearBoresightDirectPath/has_direct_path/is_near_boresight

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/direct_path.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/pattern.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/edge_cases.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/mod.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ComputationMode reduced to 3 variants", "near-boresight moderate-offset selects StandardPhysicalOptics", "no direct_path references remain in either crate"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Wire phase_center_offset into axial defocus
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make the ignored phase_center_offset parameter contribute to feed axial defocus; delete never-called phase_center_offset_phase.

**Files:** integration.rs:513-514 + test, illumination.rs (delete fn ~357 + tests ~578-607), mod.rs:57, geometry.rs:184-186 (sign doc).

**Verify:** cargo test -p antenna-model

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/integration.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/illumination.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/mod.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/geometry.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pco=0.05m costs >1 dB at boresight vs pco=0", "phase_center_offset_phase deleted everywhere"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Use calibration temperature_const for correction lookups
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace three hardcoded 290.0 K args with calibration.validity_ranges.temperature_const.

**Files:** evaluator.rs:271 + test test_correction_uses_calibration_temperature, h3_link_budget.rs:235 and :383 + comment 130-143.

**Verify:** cargo test -p antenna-model test_correction_uses_calibration_temperature

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/h3_link_budget.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model test_correction_uses_calibration_temperature", "acceptanceCriteria": ["300 K artifact produces no temperature extrapolation warning", "no hardcoded 290.0 in evaluate_correction call sites"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Guard malformed correction-surface knot vectors
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Return ComputationError::InterpolationFailed instead of panicking when a knot vector is shorter than spline_order+1.

**Files:** correction_interpolator.rs — guard loop in evaluate_correction (~line 105) + test test_short_knot_vector_returns_error_not_panic.

**Verify:** cargo test -p antenna-model correction_interpolator

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/correction_interpolator.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model correction_interpolator", "acceptanceCriteria": ["short knot vector returns Err instead of panicking", "existing interpolator tests unchanged and green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Correct API semantics docs and stale claims
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document feed_position aim-point semantics; fix z-sign doc, loss comment, example expectations, CLAUDE.md Zernike claim. No behavior change.

**Files:** schemas.rs:239-240 and :316-321, openapi.yaml ~560 (+ sites ~133/157/349), evaluator.rs:295,316 comments, examples/requests/geo_feed_emitter_colocated_offset.json, examples/README_GEO_EXAMPLES.md, CLAUDE.md.

**Verify:** cargo build --all

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/api/schemas.rs", "openapi.yaml", "antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs", "examples/requests/geo_feed_emitter_colocated_offset.json", "examples/README_GEO_EXAMPLES.md", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build --all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["feed_position documented as Earth aim point", "feed_offset_meters z-sign doc matches phase.rs convention"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Remove dead code and add f/D consistency validation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete production-dead code (numerical_stability.rs, compute_feed_offset_v2, AzElCoordinates, unused surface/mesh items — pre-verified unused by calibrate) and cross-validate f_over_d_ratio (1% tolerance) in ReflectorGeometry::validate.

**Files:** delete numerical_stability.rs; mod.rs, coordinates_3d.rs, coordinates.rs, surface.rs, mesh.rs, data/types.rs + test.

**Verify:** cargo test --all && cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/numerical_stability.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/mod.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/coordinates_3d.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/coordinates.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/surface.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/mesh.rs", "antenna-model/src/data/types.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --all && cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dead items deleted", "surface.rs/mesh.rs pruned to items with real callers", "f_over_d_ratio inconsistency > 1% rejected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Final verification sweep
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fmt, clippy, full test suite, doc build, and the steering regression file all clean/pass; commit any fmt fallout.

**Verify:** cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings && cargo test --all && cargo test -p antenna-model --test beam_steering_direction

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings && cargo test --all && cargo test -p antenna-model --test beam_steering_direction", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fmt/clippy/test/doc all clean", "beam_steering_direction regression tests pass"]}
```
